change_pw_intro: Hi {name} — please choose a new password to continue.
change_pw_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
portfolio_access_denied: Portfolio management requires manager or owner role.
portfolio_desc: Assign clients to accountants. Employees only see their assigned clients.
unassigned_clients_hint: Use the Add client button on an accountant card below.
no_employees: No employee accounts found in the database.
filing_no_docs: No documents found for this period.
err_no_posting_job: No posting job exists for this document
upload_hint: Drag and drop files here, or click to select. Accepted: PDF, PNG, JPG.
note_hint: E.g. Supplier invoice January, travel receipt…
footer_note: Your documents are processed in full confidentiality.
pc_close_period_confirm: Close this period? This cannot be undone.
pc_all_complete_msg: All items complete or waived. You may now close the period.
err_pc_period_locked: This period is locked and cannot be modified.
err_pc_items_open: All items must be complete or waived before closing the period.
err_pc_client_period_required: Client code and period are required.
time_no_entries: No time entries found for this period.
rq_warning_text: This pre-fill is for reference only. The accountant is responsible for filing. LedgerLink does not file directly with Revenu Québec.
rq_line_101: Line 101 — Total sales and other revenues / Ventes totales
rq_note_sales_not_tracked: Revenue not tracked — enter actual sales figures when filing
rq_quick_method_active: Quick Method is active for this client
rq_quick_method_no_itc: Under Quick Method, ITC/ITR are not claimed (lines 106 and 207 = $0.00)
bank_import_upload_hint: Upload a PDF or CSV bank statement from Desjardins, National Bank, BMO, TD, or RBC.
bank_import_no_results: No results yet. Upload a bank statement above.
fraud_vendor_amount_anomaly: Amount {amount} is {sigma}σ from this vendor’s mean ({mean}) — statistical outlier
fraud_vendor_timing_anomaly: Invoice dated {days} days from vendor’s typical billing day ({avg_day})
fraud_duplicate_exact: Possible duplicate: {amount} from {vendor} already appears within {days} day(s) (Doc {doc_id})
fraud_duplicate_cross_vendor: Same amount {amount} appeared from different vendor “{other_vendor}” within {days} day(s) (Doc {doc_id})
fraud_weekend_transaction: Transaction dated on a {weekday} for {amount} — outside normal business days
fraud_holiday_transaction: Transaction dated on a statutory holiday ({holiday}) for {amount}
fraud_round_number: Exactly round amount {amount} from vendor who normally invoices irregular amounts
fraud_new_vendor_large: First invoice from “{vendor}” for {amount} (threshold: {threshold}) — vendor never seen before
fraud_bank_account_change: Vendor bank details changed: {old} → {new} — verify before paying
fraud_invoice_after_payment: Invoice dated {invoice_date} is AFTER bank payment dated {payment_date} ({days} day(s) later) — timeline anomaly
fraud_tax_registration_contradiction: Vendor “{vendor}” charges GST/QST but is historically flagged as unregistered/exempt — verify tax registration
fraud_vendor_category_shift: Vendor “{vendor}” history is {history} but current document is {current} — category contradiction
fraud_vendor_payee_mismatch: Payment recipient “{payee}” does not match invoice vendor “{vendor}” (similarity {similarity}) — possible related-party redirection
comm_edit_hint: Review and edit the draft before sending.
err_comm_smtp_not_configured: SMTP not configured — set up the digest section in ledgerlink.config.json
err_comm_already_sent: This message has already been sent
cal_no_deadlines: No filing deadlines in the next 90 days.
err_cal_forbidden: Manager or owner access required to view the filing calendar.
digest_no_filings: No filing deadlines in the next 14 days.
hallucination_warning: AI extraction may be inaccurate — please verify all fields against the original document.
section_raw_ocr_hint: Text extracted before AI processing. Use this to verify the AI extraction above.
handwriting_review_banner: Handwritten document — please verify the fields below / Document manuscrit — veuillez vérifier les champs ci-dessous
err_math_mismatch: Math check failed: subtotal + taxes do not equal the total. Please verify amounts before approving.
too_many_attempts: Trop de tentatives. Réessayez dans 15 minutes / Too many attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
upload_limit_exceeded: Upload limit reached (20 per day). Try again tomorrow.
wp_no_papers: No working papers for this period.
ev_no_evidence: No evidence chains for this period.
err_lic_forbidden: Owner access required to manage license
onb_credentials_note: Distribute these credentials securely to your staff.
qr_page_subtitle: Print or share these QR codes with your clients so they can upload documents directly.
qr_scan_instructions: Scannez pour soumettre vos documents / Scan to submit your documents
qr_no_clients: No clients found. Add clients via the onboarding wizard.
cas_mat_no_assessment: No materiality assessment for this engagement.
cas_risk_no_assessments: No risk assessments for this engagement.
flash_recon_not_balanced: Cannot finalize — reconciliation is not balanced.
recon_suggest_banner: No reconciliation exists for {client} period {period}. Start one?
cas_rep_no_letter: No representation letter for this engagement.
err_rep_not_signed: Management representation letter must be signed before issuing.
cas_ctrl_no_tests: No control tests for this engagement.
cas_rp_no_auto_detect: No potential related parties detected automatically.
err_checklist_blocking: Cannot issue — the following checklist items are incomplete:
err_fraud_flags_block: This document has fraud indicators — manual review required
err_fraud_override_denied: Only manager or owner roles may override fraud flags
err_fraud_override_reason_required: A reason is required to override fraud flags
warn_credit_note_inferred: Entry kind inferred as credit from document type or negative amount
warn_substance_capex: Verify if capital asset / Vérifier si immobilisation
warn_substance_prepaid: Verify if prepaid expense / Vérifier si charge payée d'avance
warn_substance_loan: Verify if liability / Vérifier si passif
warn_substance_tax_remittance: Verify if tax liability clearing / Vérifier si compensation de passif fiscal
warn_substance_personal: Potential personal expense — blocked from auto-approval
flash_split_confirmed: Split payment confirmed — all invoices matched.
se_warning: Significant subsequent events exist without documentation — engagement incomplete.
mat_testing_required: Documented testing required for material items.
assertion_warning: Material items require completeness + existence assertions.
credit_type_adjustment: Adjustment (reduces taxable consideration — ITC/ITR must be reduced)
line_items_empty: No line items extracted for this document.
trap1_amendment_flag_raised: Amendment flag raised for filed period {period}
trap1_period_frozen: Period {period} is filed — corrections must use current period entries
trap2_tax_split_unproven: Credit memo tax split cannot be proven — manual confirmation required
trap3_overlap_detected: Work scope overlap detected between {vendor_a} and {vendor_b}
trap4_prior_contradiction: Prior treatment in {period} contradicted by later evidence
trap5_duplicate_cluster: Document is a duplicate — cluster head {head_id} handles this event
trap5_one_correction: One economic event = one correction chain
trap6_stale_version: Stale version detected (expected v{expected}, current v{current}). Refresh and retry.
trap7_journal_collision: Manual journal collides with document-backed correction — quarantined
trap7_unsupported_journal: Manual journal has no linked document — document-backed corrections take precedence
update_no_update: You are running the latest version.
update_install_confirm: This will stop the service, update files, and restart. Continue?
remote_update_confirm: This will update LedgerLink remotely. Continue?
lic_machine_overuse: WARNING: License is activated on more than {max} machines. Please deactivate unused machines.
